🍽️ Bill Splitter

Split any restaurant bill equally between multiple people, including tip.

15%
Enter the bill total and number of people

Tipping guide by country

Country Expected tip
🇺🇸 USA15–20% (expected)
🇬🇧 UK10–15% (appreciated)
🇩🇪 Germany5–10% or round up
🇫🇷 France5–10% optional
🇪🇸 SpainOptional, round up
🇯🇵 JapanNot customary

What is a bill splitter?

A bill splitter calculator divides a restaurant or group bill equally between a number of people, optionally including a tip. It tells each person exactly how much they owe, making it easy to settle up at the end of a meal.

Frequently asked questions

How do I split a bill with tip included?

Add the tip percentage to the total first, then divide by the number of people. For example, £100 bill with 15% tip = £115 total ÷ 4 people = £28.75 each.

What if people ordered different amounts?

This calculator splits the bill equally. For unequal splits, each person should pay what they ordered plus a proportional share of the tip.

Should the tip be calculated before or after splitting?

Calculate the total including tip first, then divide. This calculator does this automatically.
